violations.text: Crispy chicken was observed held at (130) degrees Fahrenheit. PIC voluntary disposed of crispy chicken. See disposal sheet for more information. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

The left door to the outside, located in the (front), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026

The (floors) in the following areas of kitchen: underneath 3-bay sink area and mop sink area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

The following equipment was observed in need of repair/adjustment... - The Ice Machine flip lid/cover was observed to be cracked and held together with tape. Equipment is to be maintained in good repair/properly adjusted. (Per the PIC, a new Ice Machine Lid is on order for replacement.) Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

At times of draining the sanitizer well of the 3-bay sink, water was observed to back up into the rinse bay until sinks were fully drained. The plumbing system is to be maintained in good repair. (Per the PIC, the grease trap is to be cleaned for better/faster sink drainage. PIC is to ensure there is no clean equipment in the sink wells when draining to prevent possible contamination with backing up water until grease trap is cleaned.) Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris... - floors and walls under and behind equipment - ceiling vents - walk-in cooler floor The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. (At the time of inspection, cleaning of the facilities was observed to have been started. Per the PIC, more time is needed for thorough cleaning throughout.) Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Peppercorn Aioli Sauce and Honey Mustard Sauce (both labeled keep refrigerated) were observed held at 68 and 73 degrees Fahrenheit respectively. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC to keep sauces labeled "keep refrigerated" held in refrigeration between uses. Sauces were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection by the PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

The following equipment was observed in need of repair/adjustment... - The Ice Machine flip lid/cover was observed to be cracked and held together with tape. - The wall mounted sanitizing chemical dispenser was observed to not provide proper sanitizer mixture without manually adjusting. Equipment is to be maintained in good repair/properly adjusted. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris.... - cooking equipment - refrigeration - storage shelving equipment - Ice Machine - Hanging Screens/Monitors Equipment is to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean and to preclude the buildup of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

At times of draining the sanitizer well of the 3-bay sink, water was observed to back up into the rinse bay until sinks were fully drained. The plumbing system is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris... - floors and walls under and behind equipment - ceiling vents - walk-in cooler floor - 3-bay sink backsplash The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The following equipment was observed in need of repair/adjustment... - The Ice Machine flip lid/cover was observed to be cracked and held together with tape. - The sliding lid/cover to the chest freezer was observed to be detached from the track/not maintaining a good seal Equipment is to be maintained in good repair Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the equipment of and around the fryolator station, the hot hold units, and shelving in the kitchen have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2024

The floor and walls in the kitchen area under/behind equipment as well as attachments on the walls were observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
The ice machine flip top was observed cracked. Flip top to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Establishment to set up a routine cleaning schedule for ice machine. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2023
The hand sink in the kitchen was observed not properly draining. The system shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2023
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2023
Excess grease/debris was observed in the grease receptacle area. The area shall be cleaned as often as necessary. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2023
